markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX and Blaxel for AI-focused content strategy and visibility](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blaxel seeks to increase visibility for their AI agent cloud infrastructure, focusing on AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) over traditional SEO](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content strategy and execution, leveraging AI workflows and expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Engagement structure: 8-week strategy sprint ($30-40K) followed by ongoing execution ($15K/month), with 6-week lead time](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)

## Topics

### Blaxel's Business and Content Needs

  - [Building cloud infrastructure for AI agents (e.g., compute-intensive coding agents)](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Target audience: AI-first startups and developers](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Goals: Increase visibility, establish thought leadership, build trust](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Current content: Limited blog posts on Notion, moving away from this platform](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [End-to-end agency partner for content strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Focus on AI visibility and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Use of AI workflows with expert oversight (e.g., fact-checking, deep research)](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [Success story: Augment Code's organic traffic growth from April to 50k/month](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)

### Engagement Structure and Pricing

  - [Phase 1: 8-week strategy sprint ($30-40K fixed fee)](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Phase 2: Ongoing execution starting at $15K/month for daily publishing](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [12-month commitment required, but option to opt-out of Phase 2 until 7 days before Phase 1 ends](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Additional services available (e.g., programmatic content generation)](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)

### Technical Requirements and Timeline

  - [GrowthX prefers a more robust CMS than Notion (e.g., Webflow, Contentful, Sanity)](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Blaxel open to migrating from Notion if necessary (estimated 2-3 days of work)](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [Current lead time for new clients: 6 weeks (potential start in early November)](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send SOW (Statement of Work) for review](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [GrowthX to tentatively reserve a kickoff date for Blaxel](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Follow-up call scheduled for Monday, October 29th at 8:00 AM Pacific Time](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
  - [GrowthX to confirm if Notion is acceptable or recommend alternative CMS](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [Blaxel to review proposal and make a decision on moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/4xXAr2_-xPYsxuzWaYU3vAYaCR4ct2yN?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
